name: White Limo Inc
recent_news: Florida Sunbiz records show White Limo, Inc. (FL Profit Corp filed 2000-10-10) was voluntarily dissolved on 2013-06-12; not a school-bus operator. Website 'Whitecar.Ca' appears to be a Canadian limo unrelated to this entity.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Defunct since 2013 voluntary dissolution; limo/livery business, not school-bus contractor. No tuck-in opportunity.

name: Cathay Express Transportation
recent_news: Cathay Express Transportation (Flushing, NY; USDOT 4484086) is a non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) and special-needs/paratransit provider serving NYC. Self-describes as 'NYC & NY State's NEMT & Special Needs Transportation Provider'; offers wheelchair/stretcher transport, not yellow school-bus routes.
fit_notes: Marginal/low fit. NEMT and paratransit focus rather than core school-bus contractor; some SPED student transport but small fleet (~4 employees) and primary line is healthcare transport, not Summit's wheelhouse.

name: Acme Bus Corp
districts_or_customers: Long Island / NY Metro school districts (historical, including ~47 N. Shore districts sued post-bankruptcy)
recent_news: Acme Bus Corp. (Bohemia, NY), with sister Baumann & Sons Buses, was owned by ABA Transportation Holding Co. Both filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy in spring 2020 (Acme case 8:20-bk-72122; Baumann 8:20-bk-72121; ABA 8:20-bk-72599 in EDNY) after COVID-related non-payment by school districts. In 2021 the estate sued ~47 Long Island school districts seeking >$20M. Now widely cited as defunct.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Bankrupt/defunct since 2020 under ABA Transportation Holding (Chapter 11, EDNY). No operating business to acquire; routes have long since been re-bid to other LI operators.

name: SP & R Transportation
recent_news: SP & R Transportation (17 New Salem St, Wakefield, MA) is listed under school bus transportation; small operator (D&B estimates ~$130K revenue, ~2 employees). Source obituary indicates an Alan Aronson died in 2012, raising uncertainty about whether the listed 'Allan Aronson (Manager)' is still active or a successor. No website found.
fit_notes: Marginal fit. Very small family operator near Boston suburbs; succession likely high given long-tenured principal and tiny employee base. Sub-scale on its own but could be a bolt-on micro-tuck-in if Summit has a MA platform; likely too small to move the needle.

name: Xiong Bus Station LLC
recent_news: No web presence found for Xiong Bus Station LLC (Minneapolis, MN). Not surfaced in MSBOA directory, MnDOT transit provider list, or Minneapolis Public Schools transportation pages. Listed manager Judy Xiong; phone 'Not Available' in source data. Existence and operating status of a school-bus contractor with this name cannot be independently confirmed.
fit_notes: Low/unverified fit. No external corroboration of an active school-bus operator under this name; likely either very small, mis-coded, or a different business type. Would require direct MN SOS lookup and phone confirmation before any outreach.
